title: OpenAI upgrades ChatGPT free tier with faster GPT-5.4 Mini, adds new 'subagent' capabilities
snippet: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano models for free users. OpenAI says its new Mini model excels in tasks like coding and reasoning, while Nano model focuses on speed and affordability

title: How Nvidia’s newer, pricier chips will shape India’s data centre ambition
snippet: Analysts say that while cutting-edge data centres will adopt Nvidia's more energy-efficient Vera Rubin chips, most other data centres will use older, cheaper GPUs to scale computing capacity.

title: Oura debuts in India with Oura Ring 4 launch: Price, specs, health features and more
snippet: Oura has launched the Oura Ring 4 in India, priced at  ₹28,900 for basic models and  ₹39,900 for premium variants. An Oura Membership is required for health insights, costing  ₹599 monthly. The ring will be available starting March 18 via Amazon and Croma.

title: Poco X8 Pro, X8 Pro Max with HyperOS 3, IP68/IP69 rating launched: Price, specs launch offers and more
snippet: Poco has unveiled the X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max, featuring MediaTek processors, IP68/IP69 ratings, and large batteries. Both models have AMOLED displays with 120Hz refresh rate, 50MP cameras, and run on latest HyperOS 3.&nbsp;

title: POCO X8 Pro Series Launch Highlights: Poco X8 Pro, Iron Man edition, X8 Pro Max launched - Check price, specs and more
snippet: Poco has launched the Poco X8 Pro, X8 Pro Max and the X8 Pro Iron Man edition globally as well as in India.

title: Mint Explainer | What Instagram’s encryption rollback means for the privacy–safety debate
snippet: Meta’s rollback spotlights a global clash between user privacy and law enforcement access as governments push back against end-to-end encryption

title: Vivo T5x with 6.76-inch FHD+ 120Hz display and 7,200mAh battery launched in India, price starts at  ₹18,999
snippet: Vivo has launched the T5x 5G in India with MediaTek chipset and a massive 7200mAh battery for under  ₹20,000. It offers military-grade durability, water resistance, and various launch offers.

title: Samsung Galaxy M17e 5G with  Dimensity 6300 SoC, 6000mAh battery launched in India: Price, launch offers and more
snippet: Samsung has launched the Galaxy M17e 5G in India, featuring a dual rear camera, 6000mAh battery, and a 6.7-inch HD+ display. Priced from  ₹12,999, it comes in 4GB and 8GB RAM options

title: Poco X8 Pro, X8 Pro Max India price leaks just hours ahead of launch: here's what to expect
snippet: Poco is launching its Poco X8 Pro series globally and in India today. Leaked prices suggest the X8 Pro will cost  ₹33,999 for the 8GB model and  ₹37,999 for 12GB. The X8 Pro Max is expected at  ₹41,999 and  ₹45,999 for its two variants.

title: Apple debuts AirPods Max 2 headphones: What's in for musicians, podcasters and gamers?
snippet: The AirPods Max 2 offer active noise cancellation that’s 1.5x more effective than the original model, which came out in late 2020, Apple said Monday in a statement.

title: A mystery AI model has developers buzzing: Is this DeepSeek's latest blockbuster?

title: Early summer heat drives D2C and quick commerce demand for essentials
snippet: Typically, the peak season for brands selling beverages and ice creams, this summer is expected to see a higher share of sales coming from quick commerce platforms, as these products are often impulse purchases that consumers prefer to have delivered quickly.

title: Trump administration defends Anthropic blacklisting in US court
snippet: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth designated Anthropic, the maker of popular AI assistant Claude, a national security supply chain risk on March 3 after the company refused to remove guardrails ‌against its ⁠technology being ⁠used for autonomous weapons or domestic surveillance.

title: Nvidia preparing Groq chips that can be sold in Chinese market, sources say
snippet: Nvidia licensed technology from Groq, an AI chip startup, late last year in ‌a $17 billion deal ⁠and ⁠showed a new lineup of products based around its chips at its annual developer conference in San ​Jose, California, this week.

title: Amazon CEO sees AI doubling prior AWS sales projections to $600 billion by 2036
